label: Model Predictions
description: ML model predictions for upcoming fixtures: 1X2, xG, BTTS, and over/under probabilities with confidence scores.

0.5.note: FIXED: MOCK_PREDICTIONS direct import removed; now sourced from useSportsData().predictions via context (predictions field added to SportsDataContextValue and SportsDataProvider).

0.6.note: Loading guard via Spinner on wsStatus=connecting.

0.7.note: Empty state: 'No predictions for current filter' rendered when filtered.length===0.

0.8.note: Error guard via destructive msg on wsStatus=error|disconnected.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. 0.5 FIXED in this pass — MOCK_PREDICTIONS promoted to SportsDataContext.

1.1.note: Data via useSportsData().predictions + useSportsData().allFixtures — no inline fetch.

1.3.note: League filter applies via allFixtures from context.

1.7.note: MOCK_PREDICTIONS promoted to SportsDataContext — no longer in widget file.

l1.notes: 1.5 check was listed as pass (should be n/a) in prior pass — corrected. All checks pass.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (pre-game predictions for upcoming fixtures), paper ✓ (same view), batch ✓ (historical predictions; upcoming filter may show 0 results for past dates).

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode(). No mode-specific prediction behavior needed — predictions are pre-computed outputs.

3.5.note: Paper mode: predictions display normally — no trade actions in this widget.

3.6.note: useEffect in PredictionCard computes hoursUntil from kickoff time — no interval, runs once on mount.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human checks 3.3/3.4 pending.

4.1.note: No interactive buttons — read-only prediction cards.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 pending: verify card scroll, overflow within widget.

5.1.note: Target strategies: sports-betting, sports-arb. ML predictions support pre-game betting decisions — 1X2, xG, BTTS, O/U probabilities directly inform bet selection.

l5.notes: Agent check 5.1 complete. Human walkthrough pending.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests not yet written for sports domain.

7.1.note: FIXED: zinc-* hardcoded colors (zinc-200/400/500/600/800/900) and confidence badge colors replaced with design tokens (text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, bg-muted, border-border, bg-card/60, status tokens via CSS vars).

7.2.note: FIXED: MOCK_PREDICTIONS direct import from lib/mocks removed; promoted to SportsDataContext and accessed via useSportsData().predictions.

7.3.note: 135 lines — within 500-line limit. ProbBar and PredictionCard sub-components are appropriate decomposition.

7.4.note: Components PascalCase (ProbBar, PredictionCard, SportsPredictionsWidget), file kebab-case.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: useEffect in PredictionCard has stable [pred.kickoffUtc] dep. No inline object/array in memo deps.

l7.notes: 7.1 and 7.2 fixed in this pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: FIXED: text-xs labels (xG H/A, O2.5, BTTS, team names, conf badge, league chip, hours-until) downgraded to text-micro (10px); source and version meta to text-nano (9px). Tokens defined in app/globals.css @theme.

8.3.note: Cards use border/bg-card tokens — no custom div primitives that should be shared components. Spinner shared primitive used.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no interactive div without role — cards are read-only display. Human: keyboard walk pending.

8.5.note: Human-only: resize test at minW=4/minH=5 pending.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed — text-micro/text-nano tokens applied across prediction card metric labels. 8.2-8.3 pass. 8.4-8.5 human pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Predictions is standalone analytics — reads same league filter as fixtures but is not driven by fixture selection.

relationships.notes: Reads filters.leagues from SportsDataContext; allFixtures used for league label lookup only.

dataContract.notes: Pre-game predictions updated periodically (minutes before kickoff). REST appropriate. Real-time model inference would be batch-computed and cached.

gaps: BTTS probability only shown, not BTTS model confidence breakdown
coverage.notes: Read-only ML predictions widget — supports pre-game betting decisions.

findings.description: sports-predictions-widget.tsx:5 — MOCK_PREDICTIONS imported directly from lib/mocks/fixtures/sports-data
findings.fix: Added predictions field to SportsDataContextValue and SportsDataProvider; widget now uses useSportsData().predictions

findings.description: sports-predictions-widget.tsx — zinc-200/400/500/600/800/900 hardcoded color classes; confidence badge colors hardcoded (emerald-900/40, amber-900/40, red-900/40)
findings.fix: Replaced zinc-* with design tokens (text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, bg-muted, border-border, bg-card/60); confidence badges use status CSS var tokens

findings.description: sports-predictions-widget.tsx — MOCK_PREDICTIONS direct import from lib/mocks
findings.fix: Promoted to SportsDataContext; widget reads via useSportsData().predictions

findings.description: sports-predictions-widget.tsx:14,17,40,44,50,72,76,80,84,90,91,129 — text-[10px] for compact prediction card labels
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px) to ProbBar label/value (lines 14,17), team name & league chip (35,39), hours-until and confidence badge (44,49), 4-column stat grid xG/O2.5/BTTS labels & values (71-88); applied text-nano (9px) to source/modelVersion footer (93-94) and 'upcoming' count meta (132).
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: sports-predictions-widget.tsx:64,66 — ProbBar Home/Away uses bg-blue-600 / bg-orange-600 thematic categorical palette classes
findings.deferReason: Home vs Away are categorical/thematic (not status-semantic) and no design token exists for H/A team sides. Creating ad-hoc status token mapping would overload status semantics. Draw probability uses bg-muted which is correct. Defer until design-system provides team-side tokens or a documented chart-category palette.
